launch_inputs.research_brief: Turn the current evidence about enterprise audit-export and operator-workflow research needs into a reviewed report that leadership can use for first-party portfolio prioritization.
launch_inputs.target_audience: Agirunner product and platform leadership evaluating which research workflows to position, harden, and demo next.
launch_inputs.source_constraints: Use the uploaded research notes as anchor material and add current external sources when they materially sharpen or challenge the report.
